languages.text: {n}Замерший вивисектор едва слышно сипит:{/n} "Во имя {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}, скорее... ему еще можно помочь..." {n}Вы замечаете, что его взгляд прикован к кажущемуся мертвым техножрецу на полу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Замерший вивисектор едва слышно сипит:{/n} "Во имя {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}, скорее... ему еще можно помочь..." {n}Вы замечаете, что его взгляд прикован к кажущемуся мертвым техножрецу на полу.{/n}
traits.speaker: Vivisector

languages.text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Замерший вивисектор едва слышно сипит:{/n} "Во имя {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бога-Императора{/g}, скорее... ему еще можно помочь..." {n}Вы замечаете, что его взгляд прикован к кажущемуся мертвым техножрецу на полу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

{n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

{n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

languages.text: {n}凍ったような声で、バイセクターは吐き出す。{/n}「神皇帝の名において、急げ…まだ救えるかもしれない…」{n}彼の視線は、甲板に横たわる、まるで死んだかのようなテクプリストに向けられている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the God-Emperor, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 凍ったような声で、バイセクターは吐き出す。「神皇帝の名において、急げ…まだ救えるかもしれない…」{n}彼の視線は、甲板に横たわる、まるで死んだかのようなテクプリストに向けられている。

languages.text: {n}Donmuş Dirikesimci, zar zor duyulur bir şekilde tıslıyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} adına, acele edin... Hâlâ yardım edebiliriz..." {n}Bakışlarının güvertede ölü gibi görünen Tekno Rahip'e sabitlendiğini fark ediyorsun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Donmuş Dirikesimci, zar zor duyulur bir şekilde tıslıyor.{/n} "{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı İmparator{/g} adına, acele edin... Hâlâ yardım edebiliriz..." {n}Bakışlarının güvertede ölü gibi görünen Tekno Rahip'e sabitlendiğini fark ediyorsun.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El vivisector inmovilizado sisea, casi inaudible:{/n} «En nombre del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, dese prisa... aún podemos salvarle...». {n}Reparas en que su mirada permanece fija en el tecnosacerdote tirado en la cubierta, aparentemente muerto.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El vivisector inmovilizado sisea, casi inaudible:{/n} «En nombre del {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, dese prisa... aún podemos salvarle...». {n}Reparas en que su mirada permanece fija en el tecnosacerdote tirado en la cubierta, aparentemente muerto.{/n}

languages.text: {n}僵在原地的解剖者发出微弱的嘶声：{/n}“以{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}之名，快……他还有救……”{n}你注意到，他正死死盯着甲板上那个看似已然死亡的技术神甫。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}僵在原地的解剖者发出微弱的嘶声：{/n}“以{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}之名，快……他还有救……”{n}你注意到，他正死死盯着甲板上那个看似已然死亡的技术神甫。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le vivisecteur siffle d'une voix à peine audible :{/n} « Au nom de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, dépêchez-vous... On peut encore le sauver... »{n}Vous remarquez que son regard est fixé sur le technoprêtre que vous croyiez mort.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le vivisecteur siffle d'une voix à peine audible :{/n} « Au nom de l'{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, dépêchez-vous... On peut encore le sauver... »{n}Vous remarquez que son regard est fixé sur le technoprêtre que vous croyiez mort.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kaum hörbar zischt der erstarrte Vivisektor:{/n} "Im Namen des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperators{/g}, schnell ... noch kann ihm geholfen werden ..." {n}Du bemerkst, dass sein Blick auf den anscheinend toten Techpriester auf dem Deck fixiert ist.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Barely audibly, the frozen Vivisector hisses,{/n} "In the name of the {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, hurry... he can still be helped..." {n}You notice that his gaze is fixed on the seemingly dead Tech-Priest on the deck.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kaum hörbar zischt der erstarrte Vivisektor:{/n} "Im Namen des {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g}s, schnell ... noch kann ihm geholfen werden ..." {n}Du bemerkst, dass sein Blick auf den anscheinend toten Techpriester auf dem Deck fixiert ist.{/n}
